skill.name: theme-factory
skill.description: Apply professional color palettes and font pairings to slides, documents, reports, landing pages, and other visual artifacts.
skill.summary: Style artifacts with preset or custom themes for consistent visual design.
skill.author: anthropics

security_audit.summary: Official Anthropic skill with static Markdown theme specifications and a showcase PDF. Static findings were false positives from license URLs and ordinary wording, with no scripts, runtime networking, or dangerous instructions found.

content.value_statement: Inconsistent colors and fonts can make slides, reports, and pages feel unfinished. Theme Factory gives Claude, Codex, and Claude Code clear theme specifications to apply consistent styling.
actual_capabilities: Presents ten predefined themes with named palettes, hex colors, and font pairings.
Guides users through selecting a theme before applying it to an artifact.
Applies theme colors and typography consistently across slides or other visual outputs.
Supports custom theme creation when preset themes do not match the brief.
Uses a showcase PDF so users can compare theme options visually.
Includes recommended use contexts for each theme, such as business proposals or data visualization.
limitations: It provides design guidance and theme data, not an automated rendering engine.
It depends on the host tool to edit slides, documents, HTML, or other artifacts.
Preset themes may need adjustment for strict brand guidelines or accessibility rules.
It does not include image assets, logos, or complete layout templates.

use_cases.title: Refresh a Sales Deck
use_cases.description: Apply a cohesive color palette and font pairing to make an existing presentation look consistent.

use_cases.title: Style a Research Report
use_cases.description: Use calm, readable themes to make charts, headings, and section breaks easier to scan.

use_cases.title: Create a Campaign Look
use_cases.description: Generate a custom theme from a short creative brief and apply it across launch materials.

prompt_templates.title: Choose a Theme
prompt_templates.prompt: Show me the available Theme Factory options and help me choose one for a professional quarterly business deck.

prompt_templates.title: Apply a Preset Theme
prompt_templates.prompt: Apply the Ocean Depths theme to this presentation. Keep the content unchanged and improve visual consistency.

prompt_templates.title: Match a Document Tone
prompt_templates.prompt: Review this report and recommend the best Theme Factory preset for a serious executive audience. Then apply it consistently.

prompt_templates.title: Create a Custom Theme
prompt_templates.prompt: Create a new theme for a healthcare analytics product. Use a trustworthy tone, accessible contrast, and clear font pairings.

output_examples.input: A plain investor presentation needs a polished but calm visual style.
output_examples.output: The skill recommends Ocean Depths, then applies deep navy backgrounds, teal accents, seafoam highlights, and readable sans-serif typography.

output_examples.input: A product launch page needs a modern technology look.
output_examples.output: The skill selects Tech Innovation and uses electric blue accents, high-contrast dark sections, clean white text, and bold headings.

output_examples.input: No preset fits a sustainability workshop handout.
output_examples.output: The skill creates a custom theme with natural greens, warm neutrals, accessible contrast, and a descriptive theme name for review.

best_practices: Review the showcase PDF before choosing a preset theme.
Confirm the target audience and artifact type before applying colors and fonts.
Check contrast and readability after styling every major section.
anti_patterns: Do not mix several preset themes in one artifact without a clear design reason.
Do not apply a dramatic theme to content that needs quiet readability.
Do not skip user confirmation when the skill offers multiple theme choices.

faq.question: What artifacts can Theme Factory style?
faq.answer: It can guide styling for slides, documents, reports, HTML landing pages, and similar visual artifacts.

faq.question: How many preset themes are included?
faq.answer: The skill includes ten preset themes, each with colors, fonts, and recommended use contexts.

faq.question: Can it create a new theme?
faq.answer: Yes. It can generate a custom theme from a brief when none of the presets fit.

faq.question: Does it modify the showcase PDF?
faq.answer: No. The instructions say to display the showcase PDF for review without modifying it.

faq.question: Does it guarantee accessibility compliance?
faq.answer: No. It instructs the assistant to ensure contrast and readability, but formal accessibility checks remain separate.

faq.question: Which AI tools can use this skill?
faq.answer: The report marks support for Claude, Codex, and Claude Code.
